author: US Bureau of Labor Statistics
title: US CPI comes in at 4.2% YoY vs 3.1% expected
content: US CPI comes in at 4.2% YoY versus 3.1% expected, a hot inflation surprise that implies a more hawkish Fed and a risk-off move across markets.
_expected: BEAR 4, BTC/USDT -> rejected 'no short on spot' if no open position
